name: Gaurav Goel
body: Gaurav is the founder and CEO of Samagra, the governance consulting firm he started in 2012 that works with political and bureaucratic leadership at the Centre and in states to solve governance problems at scale. Samagra pairs a top-down consulting approach with bottom-up understanding of the governance ecosystem, backed by deep technology and data expertise. Its justice portfolio anchors much of PUCAR's court transformation work.
